site.title: Gulu Lakovwira Ŵanthu pa Caru Cose Kuti Ŵapulikiske Baibolo
site.tagline: Kuchokera pa Kufunika kwa Kufikira ku Repo ya Boma
nav.label: Vinthu vyakwamba
meta.home.description: IATF yikung'anamura ivyo vikukhumbikwa kuti vinthu viŵe vyambura kusuzga kuvipulikiska.
meta.projects.description: Ŵazgani nkhani za IATF izo zili kulembeka kuti ŵanthu wose ŵazipulikenge.
meta.propose.description: Pemphani IATF kuti yimovwirani pa webusayiti, pa e-mail, panji pa Discord.
meta.governance.description: Ŵazgani umo IATF yikupokelera mapulogiramu, umo yikupwelelera vyakusungiramo, na umo yikuchitira kuti ntchito yake yiŵe yakumanyikwa na ŵanthu wose.
meta.join.description: Njira zogwirira ntchito mu IATF: kupereka code, kutembenuza, kuyesa, kapena kusunga polojekiti.
meta.accessibility.description: Kasi IATF yikukhumba wuli kuti webusayiti iyi yiŵe yakufikapo kweniso umo mungapharazgira para pali suzgo.
meta.transparency.description: Mabuku gha IATF ghakupharazgika ku ŵanthu wose.
registry.empty.title: Palije pulogiramu iyo yalembeka
proposal.form.title: Tumizani pempho
proposal.form.body: Lembani fomu iyo yili pasi apa kuti mutume pempho ku IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript ndiyo yikukhumbikwa pakugwiliskira nchito fomu ya pa webusayiti iyi. Usange yilipo yayi, gwiliskirani nchito e-mail panji Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live submission is not configured in this environment. This form will open your email client instead. M'malo mwake fomu iyi yizamujura email client yinu.
proposal.form.ready: Para mwatuma pempho linu, IATF yizamulemba zina la awo mwaŵapokelera.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Chonde lembani ndondomeko ya spam pambere mundatumizge.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Chitetezo cha Spam chaleka kugwira ntchito. Chonde lembanipo dankha pambere mundatumizge.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Chitetezo cha Spam sichikuwoneka. Chonde yesani kachiwiri.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Chitetezo cha Spam chatha. Chonde yesani kuyambiraso.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Chonde lembani malo ghose agho mukukhumba pambere mundatumizge.
proposal.form.success: Tikuwonga, pempho linu talipokelera ndipo tili kulisunga kuti tilongosore.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Para mwambaso kudumbiskana na IATF pa nkhani iyi, lembani fundo izo zili pasi apa.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Cinthu cinyake cikanangika apo mukatumizganga pempho ili. Chonde yezganiso. Usange suzgo likulutilira, lembani pa e-mail.
project.detail.problemTitle: Kasi ni suzgo wuli ilo pulojekiti iyi yikumazga?
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Nkhani iyi yili kulembeka mu Cingelezi, ndipo mungasazgirako mazgu ghanyake para pajumpha nyengo.
footer.label: Chigaŵa cha pasi pa webusayiti
footer.blurb: Ntchito yakovwira ŵanthu kuti ŵapulikiske Baibolo yikwenera kuŵa yipusu kuti munthu wayambe, kupulinta, ndiposo kuŵa yakufwatuka.
footer.source: Kufikira kwa miyezo yofikira: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Kucita vinthu mwakuyana na ivyo awo ŵakugwiliskira nchito vinthu ivi ŵakucita.
contact.label: Umo Mungaŵawovwilira
translation.label: Umo Ntchito ya Kung'anamura Yikwendera
translation.source: Cingelezi ndico ni ciyowoyero cakwambilira pa peji ili.
translation.humanReviewed: Munthu munyake uyo wakumanya kuyowoya makora wakaweleramo mu Baibolo la Mang'anamuliro gha Charu Chiphya.
translation.machineAssisted: Baibolo ili lili kung'anamulika na makina ndipo palije uyo wakumanya makora umo lingalembekera.
translation.needsUpdate: Baibolo ili likang'anamulika pambere ŵandalifumiske mu Chingelezi, ntheura likwenera kuweleramo dankha.
translation.report: Lembani nkhani ya kung'anamulika: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Nkhaŵa na citima comene .
